svg.text: Subscription: goneset (0f94670d-1eff-45a0-a2f8-8215eb135886) · Region: West Europe · Production (two planes: persistent control + ephemeral sandbox)
inbound 443 only · outbound denied (except DNS + ACME) · VM↔VM blocked
Sandbox VM NIC lives here — VM resource in confidant-sandboxes-rg →
4 vCPU / 32 GB · isolated · runs the whole app + local model
reverse proxy · HTTPS 443 on VM FQDN
local inference · no external LLM egress
keyless access to Table Storage via private endpoint
Dashed = provisioning / encryption (CMK) / identity. Azure-styled icons. Ingress via Caddy TLS on the VM (no Azure Load Balancer).
